channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Passengers Evacuated from Cruise Ship After Hantavirus Outbreak in Canary Islands
item.description: A Dutch-flagged cruise ship, the MV Hondius, has docked near Tenerife in Spain’s Canary Islands following a hantavirus outbreak that began almost a month ago. Spanish authorities have started evacuati...

item.title: Official Lotto Results for May 10, 2026 Announced by PCSO
item.description: On May 10, 2026, the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) officially announced the lotto results for various games. ABS-CBN News reported the outcomes to keep the public informed, as the lotto...

item.title: Two arrested over arson at former East London synagogue
item.description: British counter-terrorism police have detained a man and a woman following an arson attack on a former synagogue located in East London. The incident, which has sparked concerns about hate-related cri...

item.title: Tshwane Mayor Outlines Strategy to Address Crime, Illegal Immigration, and Urban Challenges
item.description: Tshwane Executive Mayor Nasiphi Moya, representing ActionSA, has reaffirmed her commitment to tackling illegal immigration, organised crime, and urban decay as the city heads towards the local governm...

item.title: Gachagua Denounces Karangu Muraya over 10-Year Ruto Prophecy
item.description: Kenya's Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has openly criticised content creator and musician Karangu Muraya over a prophecy shared at State House, Nairobi. Karangu, who was serving as an MC at a gathe...

item.title: Super Falcons Plan Short UK Training Camp and Friendly for 2026 WAFCON Preparations
item.description: The Super Falcons of Nigeria dey gear up well well for the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations as dem don arrange one short training camp for United Kingdom from May 23 to 28. According to the Nigeria ...

item.title: Palace urges evidence-based responses to Senator Imee Marcos' claims on impeachment pressure
item.description: Palace Press Officer Undersecretary Claire Castro responded to a video posted by Senator Imee Marcos, stating that accusations must be supported by solid evidence rather than mere speculation. Castro ...

item.title: Iranian conservationists begin stabilisation work on war-damaged heritage sites including Golestan Palace
item.description: According to recent reports, Iranian conservationists are working hard to protect and stabilise historic sites that were damaged during the recent conflict with the United States and Israel. The war t...

item.title: Jeff Goldblum Shares His Favourite Songs and Musical Inspirations
item.description: Jeff Goldblum, the actor and accomplished pianist, has shared insights into his personal music tastes in a recent feature. Growing up in Pittsburgh, Goldblum fell in love with jazz at an early age, fa...

item.title: Why people tend to prefer the music from their teenage and young adult years
item.description: The article explores the common phenomenon where individuals, often starting around age 25, believe that the music from their youth sounds superior to contemporary releases. This generational pattern ...

item.title: Introducing the 2026 Miss Philippines Winners
item.description: ABS-CBN's Metro.Style recently highlighted the winners of the latest Miss Philippines pageant, celebrating the new titleholders for 2026. While the article does not provide specific names or detailed ...

item.title: General Motors Settles California Privacy Lawsuit for $12.75 Million Over Sale of Driver Data
item.description: General Motors has reached a settlement with California Attorney General Rob Bonta and other law enforcement agencies, agreeing to pay $12.75 million in civil penalties for allegedly selling personal ...

item.title: NTA releases guidelines and document list for CUET UG 2026 exam scheduled tomorrow
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released important instructions and guidelines for students appearing in the CUET UG 2026 examination scheduled for tomorrow. Candidates are advised to carefully ...

item.title: Momba farmers achieve fair prices in first digital sesame auction
item.description: Farmers in Momba District, Songwe Region, are experiencing hope and satisfaction after the district’s first sesame auction using a digital trading system. A total of 928 tonnes of sesame were offered ...

item.title: Kinangop MP Zac Kwenya Thuku Mourns the Passing of His Father
item.description: Nyandarua – The nation joins Kinangop MP Zac Kwenya Thuku in mourning the loss of his father, Mzee Thuku wa Kwenya, who passed on Sunday, May 10, 2026. The Jubilee Party lawmaker shared the sad news o...

item.title: Pakistan and Qatar Reaffirm Support for Regional Peace Efforts
item.description: Pakistan and Qatar have reiterated their shared commitment to supporting ongoing efforts aimed at promoting lasting peace and constructive dialogue in the Middle East. During a telephone call, Prime M...

item.title: Madison Beer features Justin Herbert in music video; Baseball highlights and early grilling season
item.description: Madison Beer recently released her music video for 'lovergirl,' featuring her boyfriend, Los Angeles Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert. Rather than seeing Herbert's appearance as a distraction from ...

item.title: Collection of notable political cartoons for May 11, 2026
item.description: This article from The Age presents a selection of political cartoons for May 11, 2026, highlighting key moments in Australian politics and public discourse through satire and visual commentary. While ...

item.title: Senator Goje Declares Readiness for APC Primaries Amid Consensus Issues in Gombe Central
item.description: Senator Mohammad Danjuma Goje, former governor of Gombe State and current senator representing Gombe Central Senatorial District, don declare say him dey ready to contest for the APC primaries wey go ...

item.title: Rema Confirmed as Lead Performer at 2026 FIFA World Cup Opening in Los Angeles
item.description: Afrobeats superstar Rema don dey set to make history again as e go headline the opening ceremony of the FIFA World Cup 2026 for Los Angeles. The organisers confirm say the ‘Calm Down’ hitmaker go perf...
